name: Cisco Enterprise Networking Tools
description: MCP tools for Cisco Enterprise Networking dashboards and cross-product queries
author: cisco-enterprise-networking-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_ent_overview
tools.title: Enterprise Networking Overview
tools.description: Cross-product overview: event counts, sourcetypes, and data freshness across Catalyst Center, ISE, SD-WAN, and Cyber Vision.
tools.spl: index IN ("catalyst", "ise", "sdwan", "cybervision") | stats count as events, dc(sourcetype) as sourcetypes, latest(_time) as last_event by index | eval last_event=strftime(last_event, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort index
examples: How much data do we have?

tools.name: cisco_ent_network_health
tools.title: Network Health Summary
tools.description: Aggregate network health from Catalyst Center device and network health data.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype IN ("cisco:dnac:networkhealth", "cisco:dnac:devicehealth") | spath | stats latest(overallHealth) as health by sourcetype | eval status=if(health>=80, "Healthy", if(health>=50, "Warning", "Critical"))

tools.name: cisco_ent_security_posture
tools.title: Security Posture
tools.description: Security summary combining ISE authentication data, Catalyst Center advisories, and Cyber Vision vulnerabilities.
tools.spl: index IN ("catalyst", "ise", "cybervision") sourcetype IN ("cisco:ise*", "cisco:dnac:securityadvisory", "cisco:cybervision:vulnerabilities") | stats count by index, sourcetype | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_ent_ise_auth_failures
tools.title: ISE Authentication Failures
tools.description: Show recent ISE authentication failures for security investigation.
tools.spl: index=ise sourcetype="cisco:ise*" | search failure OR failed OR reject | stats count by src_ip, user, reason | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_ent_catc_issues_priority
tools.title: Catalyst Center Issues by Priority
tools.description: Break down Catalyst Center issues by priority and category for triage.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype="cisco:dnac:issue" | spath | stats count by priority, issueId, name | sort -priority, -count

tools.name: cisco_ent_cv_ot_devices
tools.title: Cyber Vision OT Devices
tools.description: List OT devices discovered by Cisco Cyber Vision with risk indicators.
tools.spl: index=cybervision sourcetype="cisco:cybervision:devices" | spath | stats count by name, type, ip, risk | sort -risk
